description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The exterior features a mix of light-colored siding and brickwork, with red accents on the window shutters and door. The front yard is landscaped with trees and shrubs, and a paved driveway leads to a single-car garage attached to the right side of the house. The backyard includes a wooden deck, lounge chairs, and a swimming pool surrounded by additional greenery. Several cars are parked in designated spaces in front of the house, and the property is bordered by a mix of mature and ornamental trees.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, attached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool with a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway with parked cars, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, lounge chairs, swimming pool, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, backyard pool area, and the arrangement of parked cars in the front.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, columns, and steps leading up from the driveway
